content.query:
CREATE PROCEDURE sp_load_products
AS
BEGIN

    DECLARE @audit_id       NVARCHAR(64)
    DECLARE @records_read   INT = 0
    DECLARE @inserted       INT = 0
    DECLARE @updated        INT = 0
    DECLARE @rows_affected  INT = 0
    DECLARE @error_msg      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL
    DECLARE @run_date       DATETIME = GETDATE()
    DECLARE @before_count   INT = 0
    DECLARE @after_count    INT = 0

    BEGIN TRY

        -- =============================================
        -- STEP 1: stg → master_products
        -- =============================================
        SET @records_read = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stg_products)
        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_products)

        MERGE master_products AS tgt
        USING stg_products AS src
        ON tgt.product_id = src.product_id

        WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
            tgt.title                   = src.title,
            tgt.description             = src.description,
            tgt.category                = src.category,
            tgt.brand                   = src.brand,
            tgt.sku                     = src.sku,
            tgt.price                   = src.price,
            tgt.discount_percentage     = src.discount_percentage,
            tgt.rating                  = src.rating,
            tgt.stock                   = src.stock,
            tgt.availability_status     = src.availability_status,
            tgt.minimum_order_quantity  = src.minimum_order_quantity,
            tgt.weight                  = src.weight,
            tgt.depth                   = src.depth,
            tgt.height                  = src.height,
            tgt.width                   = src.width,
            tgt.warranty_information    = src.warranty_information,
            tgt.shipping_information    = src.shipping_information,
            tgt.return_policy           = src.return_policy,
            tgt.barcode                 = src.barcode,
            tgt.thumbnail               = src.thumbnail,
            tgt.updated_at              = src.updated_at,
            tgt.load_date               = src.load_date,
            tgt.hash_key                = src.hash_key,
            tgt.dw_modified_date        = @run_date

        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
            product_id, title, description, category, brand, sku,
            price, discount_percentage, rating, stock, availability_status,
            minimum_order_quantity, weight, depth, height, width,
            warranty_information, shipping_information, return_policy,
            barcode, thumbnail, created_at, updated_at,
            load_date, source_system, hash_key,
            dw_created_date, dw_modified_date
        )
        VALUES (
            src.product_id, src.title, src.description, src.category, src.brand, src.sku,
            src.price, src.discount_percentage, src.rating, src.stock, src.availability_status,
            src.minimum_order_quantity, src.weight, src.depth, src.height, src.width,
            src.warranty_information, src.shipping_information, src.return_policy,
            src.barcode, src.thumbnail, src.created_at, src.updated_at,
            src.load_date, src.source_system, src.hash_key,
            @run_date, @run_date
        );

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_products)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @updated       = @records_read - @inserted
        SET @rows_affected = @records_read

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('master_products', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'master_products', @records_read,
            @inserted, @updated, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

        -- =============================================
        -- STEP 2: master → dim_category
        -- =============================================
        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_category)

        MERGE dim_category AS tgt
        USING (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                ABS(CHECKSUM(category)) AS category_key,
                category                AS category_name,
                @run_date               AS created_date
            FROM master_products
            WHERE category IS NOT NULL
        ) AS src
        ON tgt.category_key = src.category_key

        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
            category_key, category_name, created_date
        )
        VALUES (
            src.category_key, src.category_name, src.created_date
        );

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_category)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @rows_affected = @inserted

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('dim_category', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'dim_category', @inserted,
            @inserted, 0, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

        -- =============================================
        -- STEP 3: master → dim_brand
        -- =============================================
        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_brand)

        MERGE dim_brand AS tgt
        USING (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                ABS(CHECKSUM(brand)) AS brand_key,
                brand                AS brand_name,
                @run_date            AS created_date
            FROM master_products
            WHERE brand IS NOT NULL
        ) AS src
        ON tgt.brand_key = src.brand_key

        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
            brand_key, brand_name, created_date
        )
        VALUES (
            src.brand_key, src.brand_name, src.created_date
        );

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_brand)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @rows_affected = @inserted

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('dim_brand', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'dim_brand', @inserted,
            @inserted, 0, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

        -- =============================================
        -- STEP 4: master → fact_product_pricing
        -- =============================================
        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_products)

        INSERT INTO fact_product_pricing (
            fact_id, product_id, category_key, brand_key,
            price, discount_percentage, discounted_price,
            stock, rating, load_date, pipeline_run_date
        )
        SELECT
            ABS(CHECKSUM(m.product_id, @run_date)),
            m.product_id,
            ABS(CHECKSUM(m.category)),
            ABS(CHECKSUM(m.brand)),
            m.price,
            m.discount_percentage,
            ROUND(m.price - (m.price * m.discount_percentage / 100), 2),
            m.stock,
            m.rating,
            m.load_date,
            @run_date
        FROM master_products m

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_product_pricing)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @rows_affected = @inserted

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('fact_product_pricing', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'fact_product_pricing', @before_count,
            @inserted, 0, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

    END TRY

    BEGIN CATCH

        SET @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()
        SET @audit_id  = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                         CONCAT('ERROR', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'sp_load_products', 0,
            0, 0, 0, @error_msg, @run_date
        )

    END CATCH

END
